channel.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Oct 13th, 2022
item.description:
Community

Projects

  • AlgoPingstars1 - A tiny cron job that issues a tweet if public Algorand Nodes (AlgoExplorer, AlgoNode and etc) are not healthy.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Oct 11th, 2022
item.description:
Learning

Crash Courses

  • Beaker - Framework for Algorand Smart Contract development, client and testing based on PyTeal. Live coding session (with @HGKimChris).
  • PyTeal ABI Smart Contracts - Using PyTeal to develop ABI-compliant Smart Contracts on Algorand. Final live coding section (with @_deanste).
  • Introduction to PyTeal - Introduction to PyTeal, a Python framework to develop Smart Contract on Algorand (with @matteojug).

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Oct 8th, 2022
item.description:
Learning

General courses

  • Foundations of Blockchains - A video course by Tim Roughgarden a Professor of Computer Science at Columbia University highlighting the fundamental principles, concepts and properties of Blockchain protocols.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Oct 3rd, 2022
item.description:
Learning

Crash Courses

  • Introduction to AVM and Applications - Introduction to the Algorand Virtual Machine architecture and Algorand Smart Contracts (aka Applications).

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Sep 29th, 2022
item.description:
Tools

Smart Contracts

  • avm-semanticsstars6 - Algorand Virtual Machine and TEAL Semantics in K framework. Aids with testing and formal verification of smart contracts.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Sep 16th, 2022
item.description:
Tools

Smart Contracts

  • tealishstars23 - Tealish is a readable language for the Algorand Virtual Machine. It enables developers to write TEAL in a procedural style optimized for readability.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Sep 6th, 2022
item.description:
Security Audits

  • Certik - CertiK provides the gold standard in web3 security tools, from its industry-leading smart contract audits, to its blockchain analytics tools such as Skynet and SkyTrace, making it the ideal partner in ensuring the end-to-end security of Algorand projects.
  • AlgoBuilder Audits - The team behind AlgoBuilder offering to consult your project, have smart contracts done by professionals, write automated tests or audit your existing project.
  • UlamLabs - A blockchain lab based in Poland, offering auditing services for Algorand smart contracts.
  • Runtime Verification - Smart contract analysis and verification by the team who audited platforms like Algofi, FolksFinance, Yieldly and other prominent DeFi platforms in the ecosystem.
  • Immunebytes - Secure your Algorand Smart Contract with credible security auditing solutions.
  • KudelskiSecurity - Move your blockchain project securely and successfully into production or onto mainnet. Company can help you assess, design, customize, deploy and manage blockchain and digital ledger technology systems so you can confidently leverage security as a powerful differentiator in this dynamic market.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Aug 24th, 2022
item.description:
Development

C/C++

  • vertices-algorand-sdkstars8 - The Vertices SDK provides developers with easy device access to interact with Blockchains.

    • Development

    Ruby

  • TEALrbstars6 - A Ruby DSL for writing Algorand smart contracts.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Aug 12th, 2022
item.description:
Tools

Nodes and Indexers

  • SubQuery - Open, fast, flexible, and decentralised cross-chain data indexer for Algorand (getting started guide).

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Aug 11th, 2022
item.description:
Tools

Smart Contracts

  • ASC Builder - A GUI (drag and drop) tool for developing & deploying Algorand smart contracts developed by Algoknox.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Aug 9th, 2022
item.description:
Development

Python

  • smart-asastars20 - Smart ASA PyTeal reference implementation based on ARC-20.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Jul 7th, 2022
item.description:
Development

Python

  • beakerstars46 - A tool for smart contract development on the Algorand blockchain. Inspired by flask.

    • Community

    Projects

  • AgorHashstars3 - Public, permissionless, decentralized and uncensorable free speech protocol.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Jun 28th, 2022
item.description:
Community

Projects

  • AlgoTablesstars3 - A suite of tools designed to aid everyday hodlers of ALGO who participate in the Algorand ecosystem.

item.description:
Tools

Nodes and Indexers

  • Algorand Node UIstars22 - Terminal UI for remote Algorand node management.

  • Dappflow - Algorand Private Network Explorer (supports Sandbox in localhost).

item.description:
Development

JavaScript & TypeScript

  • perawallet-connectstars38 - JavaScript SDK for integrating Pera Wallet to web applications.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Jun 4th, 2022
item.description:
Community

Projects

  • AlgoWorld-Swapperstars17 - Free and trustless ASA swapper, powered by Algorand Smart Signatures.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Jun 3rd, 2022
item.description:
Development

JavaScript & TypeScript

  • algonaut.jsstars7 - An easier Algo sdk for front-end dapps (typescript).

    • Tools

    Testing

  • irulan - Web app for deploying + testing smart contracts (open source! + PRs welcome).

    • Community

    Projects

  • algorand.dev - Algorand Developer: The unofficial developer resource.
  • STOI - Song ownership gone decentralized via microDAOs.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand May 31st, 2022
item.description:
Community

Projects

  • AlgoCloud - Algorand ecosystem dashboard. Connect DeFi apps, display NFTs, account analytics, and more.

item.description:
Community

Projects

  • Pipeline-UI - A React.js based component library for rapid deployment of Algorand Dapps.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand May 27th, 2022
item.description:
Community

Projects

  • FORUM - A proof-of-stake social network on the Algorand blockchain.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand May 20th, 2022
item.description:
Bridges

  • ptokens - pNetwork Officially Launched Cross-Chain Bridges for Algorand.

    • Community

    Projects

  • algorewards - Free and unofficial Algorand governance reward calculator. Hosted on GitHub Pages.
  • daotools - Manage all your DAO voting sessions in one Dapp.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Apr 29th, 2022
item.description:
Learning

Crash Courses

  • Algorand, efficient self-sustaining blockchain - Proof of Stake Blockchain Efficiency Framework.
  • Algorand Efficiency - Understanding Algorand's working principles and its efficiency.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Apr 12th, 2022
item.description:
Community

Projects

  • AlgoWorld-Contractsstars29 - Collection of all smart contracts used by AlgoWorld, written in PyTeal.

  • tealangstars36 - A high level language for Algorand ASC1 and TEAL.

Projects

JavaScript & TypeScript

  • algo-builderstars129 - Framework to automate development of Algorand Assets and Smart Contracts.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Mar 31st, 2022
item.description:

Testing

  • gravitonstars14 - Algorand's TEAL blackbox testing toolkit.
  • tealerstars39 - Static TEAL analyser with a set of vulnerability detectors for quick contracts reviews.

Crash Courses

Docker

  • Algorand Sandbox Devstars9 - Docker Hub image for faster local development and CI/CD usage.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Feb 28th, 2022
item.description:
Wallets

  • Pera Wallet - Secure, open source and community driven wallet for mobile devices. Maintained by the team behind official Algorand Wallet.
  • Method Wallet - Algorand Wallet you'll love.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Feb 25th, 2022
item.description:
Portfolio Trackers

  • ASA Stats - One-stop portfolio tracker used to summarize Algorand asset valuations from up to five wallet addresses.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Feb 23rd, 2022
item.description:
Blockchain Explorers

  • Asalytic - Analyze the Algorand NFT space.

    • DeFi Platforms

  • Pact - Decentralised Automated Market Maker (AMM) built on the Algorand protocol.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Feb 22nd, 2022
item.description:
Bridges

  • GlitterFinance - Centralized (soon to be decentralized upon TEAL 6) bridge for Solana, Polygon, Terra and Cudos to Algorand.

    • Community

    Projects

  • QRCode Generatorstars20

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Feb 13th, 2022
item.description:
Learning

Crash Courses

  • Algorand Schoolstars57 - Algorand School crash course slide deck.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Feb 4th, 2022
item.description:
Tools

Smart Contracts

  • algomlstars20 - A domain-specific language for specifying Algorand smart contracts, which compiles into TEAL scripts.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Jan 31st, 2022
item.description:
Tools

Smart Contracts

  • reach - A domain-specific language for building cross chain decentralized applications (DApps).
  • aqua-compiler - An expressive high level language for the Algorand block chain that compiles to TEAL code.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Jan 30th, 2022
item.description:
Portfolio Trackers

  • Algogator.Finance - Track or search assets, rewards, yield farming, transactions, and NFTs on the Algorand blockchain anywhere and anytime. Built by @TeamAlgogator.

    • Blockchain Explorers

  • AlgoExplorer - Algorand blockchain explorer built by RandLabs.
  • Goalseeker - Algorand blockchain explorer built by PureStake.
  • NFTExplorer - Algorand Standard Asset (ASA) explorer built by @TomassoAE and JoshLmao.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Jan 28th, 2022
item.description:
IDEs

VSCode

  • optio-labs/teal-debugger-extensionstars14 - Debug teal with minimal AVM configuration inside VSCode.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Jan 27th, 2022
item.description:
Learning

Tutorials

  • Lending pool using Reach - Tutorial on how to build a lending pool using the Reach language.
  • Creating a License Manager Contract - Tutorial on utilizing PyTEAL and Inner Transactions.
  • Connect to Algorand Wallet via WalletConnect - Redux example using WalletConnect.

    • Community

    Projects

  • algovanity - Algorand Vanity Address Generator from Ripestars11.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Jan 25th, 2022
item.description:
Learning

Tutorials

  • AlgoMinter - Build your web app for minting assets using Python, AlgoSigner, and Anvil Platform.
  • Getting Started with Django, Python, and Algorand - Tutorial from algorand developer portal.

    • Development

    JavaScript & TypeScript

  • js-algorand-sdkstars247 - The Algorand JavaScript SDK & Examples.

    • Development

    .NET

  • unity-algorand-sdk-based-on-net-sdkstars2 - Quick and dirty Unity SDK based on .NET Algorand SDK by RileyGe.

    • Development

    Rust

  • rust-algorand-sdkstars43 - Rust Algorand SDK.

    • Development

    Swift

  • swift-algorand-sdkstars17 - A Swift SDK for interacting with the Algorand Blockchain.

    • Tools

    Nodes and Indexers

  • Algorand - The Undocumented Docsstars5 - Dev Notes for Archival Node, Indexer Setup (and more).
  • AlgoNode - Node running FAQ, Node/Indexer daily snapshots, Free Node/Indexer APIs.

    • Name Services

  • Algorand Name Service - ANS is a decentralized naming service. An Algorand smart contract stores names and governs the naming policy.

    • Community

    Projects

  • algonimstars27 - First Algorand mini-puzzle-game. Written in Python+PyTEAL by @cusma.
  • genpytealstars8 - Generate PyTeal from (mostly) normal Python.

    • Metrics

  • Algorand MainNet metrics - Dashboard that measures the current scale, security, decentralization, and adoption of the open-source Algorand protocol.
  • Algorand Stats - All stats about Algorand Governance.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Jan 24th, 2022
item.description:
Metrics

  • How Big is Algorand? - Algorand's networks size monitor.
  • Algorand Mempool - Algorand mempool explorer.
  • Metrika - Algorand network performance and account monitor.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Jan 19th, 2022
item.description:
NFT Marketplaces

  • ZestBloom - Digital Media NFT marketplace that offers ways to promote artists for their contributions.

    • ARCs

  • ARC3 - Official Algorand Standard Asset Parameters Conventions for Fungible and Non-Fungible Tokens.
  • ARC69stars34 - Unofficial Algorand Standart Asset Parameters Convention popular in Algorand NFT community, inspired by Open Sea's metadata standards and EIP-1155, created by @algokittens.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Jan 8th, 2022
item.description:
Development

Python

  • tinyman-py-sdkstars107 - Tinyman Python SDK.
  • algofi-py-sdkstars41 - Algofi Python SDK.

    • Development

    JavaScript & TypeScript

  • algofi-js-sdkstars1 - Algofi JavaScript SDK.

    • Name Services

  • NFDomains - Algorand name service and marketplace for Non-Fungible Domains (NFDs) — unique, readable aliases for wallet addresses.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Jan 7th, 2022
item.description:
Community

Projects

  • Algocurator - The Biggest Unofficial One-Stop Hub for Algorand.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Jan 6th, 2022
item.description:
Blockchain Explorers

  • Algoscan - Algoscan is a Blockchain Explorer and Analytics Platform. Built on top of the Algorand Network.

    • Development

    Dart

  • dart-algorand-sdk - Dart Algorand SDK.

    • Development

    .NET

  • unity-algorand-sdkstars29 - An Algorand SDK for Unity. Use the Algorand blockchain in your video game.

    • Community

    Projects

  • galvanitystars6 - Galvanity is Algorand vanity address generator written in Go.

    • NFT Marketplaces

  • AlgoMartstars174 - Opensource NFT marketplace whitelabel solution.
  • The GIF Economy - Decentralized NFT explorer, minting and trading.
  • ALGOxNFT - NFT gallery and marketplace.
  • Dartroom - Decentralized NFT explorer, minting and trading.
  • Alchemon - Monster-collecting NFT card game.
  • Otherverse - NFT collections marketplace.
  • Musa - Music, Art & Fashion NFT gallery and marketplace.
  • Flatter - NFT art and collectible marketplace.
  • Dahai - NFT art gallery and marketplace.
  • Aorist - NFT art gallery and marketplace.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Jan 5th, 2022
item.description:
IDEs

VSCode

  • Obsidian Labs/vscode-algorandstars12 - Algorand VS Code Extension.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Jan 4th, 2022
item.description:
Community

Projects

  • minterstars8 - Bulk mint Algorand NFTs following the ARC-69 community standard. Written in Node.js by @fish.exe.
  • Algodesk - Create, configure and manage your Assets on Algorand Blockchain.
  • algorealmstars16 - Claim the Crown and the Sceptre of Algorand Realm! Written in Python+PyTEAL by @cusma.

    • DeFi Platforms

  • Lofty.ai - Tokenized real estate investing platform.
  • Folks.finance - Decentralized capital markets protocol.
  • C3 - Cross-margin cross-collateralization clearing engine protocol.

    • Blockchain Explorers

  • Algorand Ballet - Algorand accounts' 2D graphs.
  • Algorand Multiverse - Algorand accounts' 3D graphs.

    • Development

    PHP

  • php-algorand-sdkstars18 - Algorand PHP SDK created by @ffsolutions.
  • algorand-phpstars40 - Algorand PHP SDK created by @RootSoft.

    • Development

    Python

  • pyteal-utilsstars26 - PyTEAL utilites library.

    • IDEs

    vim

  • vim-algorand-tealstars5 - Minimalistic syntax highlight for Algorand's TEAL Smart Contract language to vim.

    • IDEs

    IntelliJ

  • algoDEA - Algorand IntelliJ Plugin.

    • Tools

    Docker

  • Algorand Sandboxstars177 - Fast way to create and configure an Algorand development environment.

    • Bridges

  • Algomint - Centralized BTC and ETH bridge to Algorand.
  • QUIGON - Centralized cross-chain NFT bridge.

    • Oracles

  • Algoracle - Decentralized oracle networks that connect the Algorand blockchain with the real world.

item.title: aorumbayev/awesome-algorand Jan 3rd, 2022
item.description:
Learning

Tutorials

  • Swift iOS app using Augmented Reality for Algorand purchases - An iOS App Using Augmented Reality for Purchases.
  • MultiSig with Algorand for Co-operative Groups - Decentralised co-operative unions with Algorand Multisignature Account.
  • Algorand on RaspberryPi - Development on Algorand using Raspberry Pi.
  • Adding Notes to Transactions - Read and Write to the Transaction Note Field with Python.
  • Create Assets with a Stateful Smart Contract - Using Stateful Smart Contract To Create Algorand Standard Asset.

    • DeFi Platforms

  • Yieldly - DeFI suite for cross-chain swapping, ASA staking and lottery games.
  • Tinyman - A decentralized trading protocol, AMM and platform.
  • Algofi - Decentralized lending market and stablecoin on the Algorand blockchain.

    • Community

    Projects

  • TinyBar App - A tiny macOS menu bar app for tracking ASA prices from TinyMan.
  • arc3.xyzstars17 - Dapp that can be used to mint ARC3 compliant NFTs.
  • Auction Demostars51 - On-chain NFT auction using smart contracts.
  • Algorand Session Walletstars17 - Session wallet to allow persisted wallet connections across multiple wallets.
  • WalletConnect Example DAppstars20 - Algorand WalletConnect demo.
  • paytxstars5 - Examples of common pay transaction scenarios using the Algorand Python SDK.

    • Official

  • Algorand - Official website.
  • Algorand Foundation - Official website of the Foundation.
  • Algorand FAQ - FAQ maintained by the Algorand Foundation.
  • Algorand Governance - Official website of Algorand Governance program.
  • Algorand Developer Portal - Official Algorand developer portal.

    • Wallets

  • MyAlgo Connectstars58 - Web Wallet and JS library for signing transactions in the browser.
  • AlgoSignerstars85 - Browser plugin Web Wallet and JS library for signing transactions in the browser.

    • Development

    Go

  • go-algorandstars1.2k - Algorand's official implementation in Go.
  • go-algorand-sdkstars158 - The Algorand Golang SDK.

    • Development

    Python

  • py-algorand-sdkstars212 - The Algorand Python SDK.
  • pytealstars230 - Algorand Smart Contracts in Python.

    • Development

    Java

  • java-algorand-sdkstars54 - The Algorand Java SDK.

    • Development

    .NET

  • dotnet-algorand-sdkstars40 - Algorand .NET SDK created by @RileyGe.

    • Development

    Swift

  • algorand-walletstars150 - Algorand wallet official implementation in Swift.

    • NFT Marketplaces

  • AB2 - decentralized marketplace for crypto art assets secured on the Algorand blockchain created by @ab2_gallery.
  • Rand Gallery - Algorand Standard Asset (ASA) explorer and markeplace developed by Chris Antaki.
  • AlgoGems - Algorand Standard Asset (ASA) markeplace and trading platform for NFT collectors.
  • AlgoWorldExplorer - NFT marketplace, explorer and gallery for AlgoWorld NFTs developed by @millionalgosfather.
